title: Youtube PooP: Link's Sex Problem (For Adults)
description:
Heres Youtube PooP no.2 :D :D.

Problems with F**king everywhere. The King is Gay and likes Boys and Link wants to f**k everything. But the Carpet Guy turns up and calls the King 'Your F**kesty', and reveals that it is written that only he can F**k Link. Zelda quickly intervenes and sends Link to Gamelon to F**k Impa. But, After the quick (and horrible) sex scene (where Link shouts 'I won' at the end. ???) the Carpet Guy catches up with Link and wants Link to F**k him. The First Sex scene was so gruesome anyway that the 2nd one is only sound for you benifit (lol, what BS). Hope you enjoy it :D.
